> **How it works:** Set the publish date in the project board. Social dates
> are calculated automatically: Variant 1 on publish day, Variant 2 at +7 days,
> Variant 3 at +14 days. Edit the variants below before they post.
> Remove the `approve` label to pause automation at any time.

## Content Tracking

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Draft file    | `_posts/YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md` |
| Content type  | blog |
